title: cynanchum vulgare
intro: Cynanchum vulgare, also known as common bitters or black bryony, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its bitter principles, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cynanchum vulgare include its potential to help lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Cynanchum vulgare can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or extract, and is often used in herbal remedies to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of diabetes.
